title: Erdemium Adventures
description: Save Erdemia and its residents from horrific creature Erdemishen!
body:
### Save Erdemia and its residents from horrific creature Erdemishen!

Erdemium Adventures is a mod where you save Erdemia from a horrific creature called Erdemishen. Gather materials, talk to residents of Erdemia to fight and defeat Erdemishen when you're ready. The Erdemians will appreciate it!

Download **[Erdemium Adventures Preview Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/erdemium-adventures-preview-data-packs)** to try out experimental features before they get added officially!

I recommend using mods like [**JEI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see all recipes in this mod

Subscribe to official Erdemium Adventures YouTube channel 
[**here**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoARxlNsrbCYFtHtuycnvXQ)
for updates and trailers!
